file_callback_handler.description: LangChain built-in file logger. Writes formatted chain/LLM output to a file. No custom code needed. Good for quick persistent logging.

audit_log.description: Structured per-step audit trail. Logs every LLM prompt, response, tool call, tool output, agent action, and chain error.

token_usage_log.description: Tracks prompt, completion, and total tokens per LLM call. Disabled automatically if streaming=True (tokens not returned in stream mode).

loop_detection_log.description: Fires a warning when the same tool is called with identical input more than loop_threshold times. Escalates to the configured alert channel.

logging.description: Set to DEBUG for maximum verbosity, INFO for normal operation, WARNING for errors only.

alerts.description: Set provider to 'slack', 'teams', or 'none'. Controls which alert channel is activated at startup. No code change needed to switch channels.

notify_on.description: Set individual flags to false to suppress specific alert types.

slack.description: Reads webhook URL from the environment variable named here. Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in your .env file.

teams.description: Reads webhook URL from the environment variable named here. Set TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL in your .env file.
